title: agent-infra server configuration
description: Schema for .agents/server.json. Secrets (appSecret, tokens, passwords) must NOT be committed here — put them in .agents/server.local.json or AGENT_INFRA_SERVER_* environment variables.

path.description: Log file path. Defaults to ~/.agent-infra/logs/<project>/<repo-hash>/server.log (outside the repo; the repo-hash isolates checkouts that share a project). Relative paths resolve against the repo root; absolute paths are used as-is.

rotateAtBytes.description: Rotate the log to <path>.1 at startup if it already exceeds this size.

heartbeatMs.description: Interval between daemon heartbeat log lines, in milliseconds.

adapters.description: Per-adapter configuration. Only adapters with enabled=true are loaded.

feishu.description: Feishu (Lark) IM adapter. The appSecret must NOT be committed here — put it in .agents/server.local.json or AGENT_INFRA_SERVER_adapters__feishu__appSecret.

domain.description: Open platform domain: feishu (default) or lark.

command.description: Reserved for the command protocol (subtask C).

auth.description: Reserved for the auth model (subtask C).
